violations.description: SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cups noted being stored on the floor in the breakfast area storage room.
COOLING OF POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (5 pts): Eggs and sausage links not maintained at or below refrigeration temperatures.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. Staff unable to verify proper sanitation temperatures are achieved in the homestyle dish washing machine. Maintain logs of weekly heat tests to verfiy proper sanitation of dishware.

SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cups and plates noted being stored on the floor in the storage room. Forks spoons knives and plates noted being dispensed so that food or lip contact surfaces are being contaminated at the breakfast area.
